title: ranunculus calvescens
intro: Ranunculus calvescens, also known as Lesser Celandine or Pool Celandine, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Ranunculus calvescens include its ability to treat skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus calvescens include teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
